issues.description: ReturnToHand target should be 'ChooseOpponentActive' (active Character), not 'ChooseOpponentCharacter'. The card text specifies 'active Character'.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and ReturnToHand with maxCost:4 has no basis in card text. Card only describes one ReturnToHand action (cost 3 or less). This entire effect should be removed.
Duration should be 'DuringThisBattle' not 'EndOfBattle' for counter effects that boost during battle.
